description: Fix inaccuracies in the CLI reference and browser tools documentation: missing bare `opentabs` behavior, incorrect doctor check descriptions, and misleading browser tool description.
qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Fix CLI reference inaccuracies in cli.mdx
userStories.description: As a user of the OpenTabs CLI, I want the CLI reference to accurately describe command behavior so that I use the CLI correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: The CLI reference documents that running `opentabs` with no subcommand is equivalent to `opentabs status`
The doctor Runtime check description says it reports the Node.js version (not that it 'verifies Node.js 22+ is installed')
The doctor MCP client config check description includes OpenCode alongside Claude Code and Cursor
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Edit `docs/content/docs/reference/cli.mdx`.

1. Add a note near the top of the `opentabs` section (or next to `opentabs status`) that running `opentabs` with no subcommand runs `status`. See `platform/cli/src/cli.ts` line 35 where the root program `.action()` calls `handleStatus()`.

2. Find the doctor checks list. Check #1 says '**Runtime** -- verifies Node.js 22+ is installed'. Fix to '**Runtime** -- reports the installed Node.js version'. The code at `platform/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts` line 52 always passes and just reports `Node.js ${process.version}` — it does NOT verify the version is 22+.

3. Find doctor check #9 which says '**MCP client config** -- checks Claude Code and Cursor MCP configuration files'. Add OpenCode: '**MCP client config** -- checks Claude Code, Cursor, and OpenCode MCP configuration files'. See `platform/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts` lines 230-234 where `defaultMcpClientLocations()` returns entries for Claude Code, Cursor, and OpenCode.

userStories.title: Fix browser_focus_tab description in browser-tools.mdx
userStories.description: As a user of browser tools, I want the browser_focus_tab description to not claim it is required before screenshots, since browser_screenshot_tab auto-focuses.
acceptanceCriteria: The `browser_focus_tab` description does NOT say 'Required before taking screenshots' or similar
The description matches the actual tool purpose: focusing a tab for visual inspection or bringing it to the foreground
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes: Edit `docs/content/docs/reference/browser-tools.mdx`. Around line 35, the `browser_focus_tab` description says 'Required before taking screenshots'. Remove this claim. The `browser_screenshot_tab` tool auto-focuses the tab before capture (see `platform/mcp-server/src/browser-tools/screenshot-tab.ts` line 12-13: 'The tab is automatically focused before capture.'). The actual `browser_focus_tab` description in source (`focus-tab.ts` line 12) is: 'Useful for bringing a tab to the foreground for visual inspection.' Use a description along those lines instead.
